OUR CORE CAPABILITIES

💻

Custom Software Development

Full-stack web apps, enterprise platforms, APIs, and SaaS products built to scale.

📱

Mobile App Development

Native iOS, Android, and cross-platform mobile experiences using Flutter & React Native.

☁️

Cloud & DevOps

AWS, Azure, GCP migrations, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, Infrastructure as Code, and serverless.

⚡

AI Agents & Automation

Custom LangChain agents, AI voice telephony (Vapi, Retell), and no-code n8n/Zapier workflows to automate your business.

🧠

AI & Machine Learning

Chatbots, generative AI, predictive analytics, computer vision, NLP, and ML model deployment.

🎨

UI/UX & Creative Design

User research, brand identity, motion graphics, prototyping, 3D rendering, and design systems.

📊

Data Engineering & Analytics

ETL pipelines, data lakes, real-time dashboards, BI tools, and data-driven decision frameworks.

📈

Digital Marketing & SEO

SEO, GEO, paid ads, social media, email automation, content strategy, and marketing funnels.

🏢

Enterprise Platforms

CRM, ERP, HRMS, project management, billing & inventory, and workforce management systems.

🔒

Cybersecurity & Consulting

Penetration testing, compliance (SOC 2, GDPR), zero-trust architecture, and IT strategy audits.
